title: Stashed LodeStar Modular Storage System Organizes Gear with/ Rails, Boards & Accessories
content:
If you like well-organized storage, Stashed Products offers premium storage products for bikes, components, and accessories. Their new LodeStar products form a modular rack system specifically designed to hold your riding gear, small tools, and accessories. This flexible and expandable rack system keeps all your riding gear organized and visible.

Given that many riders are probably happy storing their gear in typical ways (in your closet/garage, on a shelf, on a basic or home-made shoe rack, coat rack, etc.), it’s obvious this system is aimed at customers with some disposable income looking to refine their garage or workshop space.  

“Every ride begins long before the first pedal stroke. We wanted to create a system that respects that ritual. A space that removes friction, protects your kit, and helps you feel ready.” – Stashed R&D Team.

Stashed Products LodeStar Rails:

The LodeStar rack system is based on either rails or boards. Both use the same mounting system, so all accessories are compatible with either the rails or the boards.

The LodeStar rails are 37.4” long and made from hard anodized 6063 T6 aluminum. They can be mounted to walls, ceilings, or floors, and positioned vertically or horizontally. Combining several rails can offer as much storage as you need to spread out your gear. The rail system can be easily expanded upon or rearranged, and is adaptable to any available wall, floor, or ceiling space. The rails can be joined together end-to-end or mounted on top of each other. LodeStar accessories can be positioned anywhere along the rail.

Each rail can hold up to 20kg of cargo. Individual rails come with two end caps, one joiner, and mounting hardware. Stashed says the LodeStar system is easy to install, but you do have to drill mounting holes in the rails. A rail drilling/cutting tool is sold separately from Stashed for $42.

One rail sells for $55, and they come in silver only. Multiple rail packages are available as well.

LodeStar Boards:

The LodeStar board is a wall-mounted platform made from powder-coated steel and cut out with 35 attachment points for accessories. The accessories slip into the board’s mounting holes and are quickly secured with a single bolt. The board measures 11.8×15.7”, and can handle a max load of 30kg. The LodeStar boards are available in Black or Bronze, and sell for $111 each.

Like the rails, multiple boards can be connected to each other. Each board comes with mounting hardware and fixings to connect multiple boards together.  

Please note – Despite their weight limit, it should be noted that Stashed does not advise hanging complete bikes from the boards or rails.

Accessories:

Stashed offers a whole suite of accessories for the LodeStar system, including clothes hangers, sunglass holders, shoe hooks, wheel hooks, various other hooks, tool trays, charging stations, water bottle holders, a bottle opener, and more.

All LodeStar accessories are load-rated, so you know what they can handle. Check out Stashed Products’ website to see all the options.   

Bundles:

If you don’t want to build your own system, you can purchase one of many pre-bundled packages. Some packages offer the choice of several bundled accessories along with your choice of either rails or boards. Some examples include the LodeStar Starter Cycling Set, the Pro Cycling Set, the Helmet and Shoe Set, the Tool Set, etc. See the website for all available bundles.

The LodeStar rack was designed to integrate with Stashed Products’ other storage systems, like the FreeStand and SpaceRail. The LodeStar rack system is covered by a 5-year warranty.

Stashed Products are built and manufactured in the UK. The LodeStar rack system is available now worldwide.

stashedproducts.com
